papers.title_en: Cerebral blood flow alterations and machine learning classification in chronic low back pain using multi-PLD ASL radiomics
papers.tldr: 本研究针对慢性腰痛（CLBP）病理机制不明的问题，利用多标记后延迟（multi-PLD）动脉自旋标记（ASL）技术获取脑血流（CBF）数据，并结合影像组学特征与机器学习算法进行分类研究。结果显示，CLBP患者特定脑区的血流模式发生显著改变，且所构建的模型具有较高的分类准确性。该研究揭示了CLBP相关的中枢神经系统改变，为临床诊断提供了新的影像学标志物。
papers.abstract_en: Chronic low back pain (CLBP) is a prevalent condition with unclear pathophysiologyand substantial socioeconomic burden. Cerebral blood flow (CBF) alterations havebeen implicated in CLBP, yet previous arterial spin labeling (ASL) studies using …

papers.title_en: IMH-Net: Importance-aware Mamba and Cross-modal Hypergraph Modeling for Precise PET/CT Tumor Segmentation
papers.tldr: 本研究针对PET/CT多模态肿瘤分割中特征融合不充分的问题，提出了IMH-Net。该模型结合了重要性感知Mamba架构以捕捉长程依赖，并利用跨模态超图建模来深度整合PET的代谢信息与CT的解剖结构。通过这种创新的双重建模方式，IMH-Net显著提升了肿瘤边界的分割精度，为放射治疗和手术规划提供了更可靠的技术支持。
papers.abstract_en: AbstractPrecise multimodal tumor segmentation is essential for radiotherapy targetcontouring, surgical planning, and therapeutic efficacy evaluation. PET providesmetabolic activity information, whereas CT offers detailed anatomical structures; their …

papers.title_en: Advancing reliable radiomics: harmonization, foundation models, and robustness in cancer imaging
papers.tldr: 该研究旨在提高影像组学和人工智能在医学影像中的可靠性与临床实用性。通过引入数据标准化、预训练基础模型以及稳健性评估框架，解决了医学影像分析中常见的可重复性差和模型泛化能力不足的问题，为癌症影像诊断提供了更具鲁棒性的技术支撑。
papers.abstract_en: The objective of the thesis was to enhance the reproducibility and clinical utility ofradiomics and AI-based medical imaging by means of harmonization, pretrainedmodels, and benchmarking frameworks. The thesis combines a methodological …

papers.title_en: Medical Multimodal Large Language Models: A Survey
papers.tldr: 随着多模态大语言模型的发展，集成临床报告、医学图像和生理数据等多种模态的医学多模态大语言模型（Medical MLLM）应运而生。本文对该领域进行了全面综述，系统梳理了医学MLLM的发展历程、核心技术架构、训练策略以及在临床诊断中的应用现状，并探讨了当前面临的挑战与未来方向，为该领域的后续研究提供了重要参考。
papers.abstract_en: In recent years, multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have gradually givenrise to medical multimodal large language models (Medical MLLMs) through theintegration of multimodal data such as clinical reports, medical images, physiological …

papers.title_en: PeFoMed: Parameter efficient fine-tuning of multimodal large language models for medical CXR
papers.tldr: 本研究提出了PeFoMed框架，旨在通过参数高效微调（PEFT）技术将多模态大语言模型（MLLM）应用于医疗胸部X光（CXR）影像分析。该方法针对医学影像的特殊性，在显著降低计算资源需求的同时，提升了模型对复杂医学图像的理解与报告生成能力，为医疗领域大模型的轻量化适配提供了有效方案。
papers.abstract_en: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) represent an evolutionary expansion inthe capabilities of traditional large language models, enabling them to tacklechallenges that surpass the scope of purely text-based applications. Recent works …

papers.title_en: Magic: Masked Anatomical Group Intra Contrastive Learning Framework for 3D Medical Image Segmentation
papers.tldr: 针对3D医学图像分割中自监督学习过度依赖易受噪声干扰的低级颜色语义（如灰度、纹理）的问题，本文提出了Magic框架。该框架引入了掩码解剖组内对比学习机制，旨在通过捕获更具鲁棒性的空间和解剖结构特征来替代不稳定的颜色特征，从而在复杂的医学成像环境下实现更精确的分割效果。
papers.abstract_en: In 3D medical image segmentation, traditional self-supervised methods often rely onlow-level color semantics such as grayscale or texture, which are susceptible toimaging parameters and noise. Consequently, contrast learning based on spatial …

papers.title_en: A fusion model of deep learning and conventional features based on computed tomography angiography of carotid plaque for predicting the risk of acute ischemic …
papers.tldr: 本研究针对颈动脉粥样硬化引起的脑卒中风险评估难题，指出传统仅依赖狭窄程度评估的局限性。研究提出了一种基于颈动脉斑块CTA图像的融合模型，将深度学习提取的高维特征与传统临床及影像组学特征相结合。实验证明，该融合模型能更准确地预测急性缺血性脑卒中的发生风险，为临床早期干预和精准医疗提供了重要的技术支持。
papers.abstract_en: Background: Stroke is one of the leading causes of death and disability worldwide,with carotid atherosclerosis figuring prominently in its etiology. Traditional riskassessment based on stenotic degree provides only limited predictive power, while …

papers.title_en: Does RL Expand the Capability Boundary of LLM Agents? A PASS@(k, T) Analysis
papers.tldr: 本文探讨了强化学习（RL）究竟是扩展了LLM智能体的能力边界，还是仅提升了其可靠性。研究者引入了PASS@(k, T)分析框架，通过对比基础模型与经过RL微调的模型在不同尝试次数和交互步数下的表现，分析了RL对智能体性能的实质影响。研究揭示了RL在提升任务成功率方面的作用机制，并探讨了其在复杂交互环境下是否能突破模型原有的能力上限。
papers.abstract_en: Does reinforcement learning genuinely expand what LLM agents can do, or merelymake them more reliable? For static reasoning, recent work answers the second:base and RL pass@ k curves converge at large k. We ask whether this holds for …

papers.title_en: WebCompass: Towards Multimodal Web Coding Evaluation for Code Language Models
papers.tldr: 随着大语言模型向端到端 Web 编程智能体演进，现有基准测试仅关注文本生成和静态指标，无法全面评估其多模态交互能力。本文提出 WebCompass，一个针对代码语言模型的多模态 Web 编程评估基准。它通过模拟真实开发场景，评估模型在处理视觉信息、交互逻辑及端到端构建复杂网页方面的表现，填补了现有评估体系的空白。
papers.abstract_en: Large language models are rapidly evolving into interactive coding agents capableof end-to-end web coding, yet existing benchmarks evaluate only narrow slices ofthis capability, typically text-conditioned generation with static-correctness metrics …

papers.title_en: Pause or Fabricate? Training Language Models for Grounded Reasoning
papers.tldr: 针对大语言模型在处理信息不全的任务时容易产生幻觉、编造虚假结论的问题，本文研究了如何训练模型进行“有据推理”。研究指出，模型在输入不完整时往往会盲目自信地输出错误信息。通过引入特定的训练机制，使模型学会在信息不足时识别缺失信息，从而显著提升了推理的可靠性，减少了虚假信息的生成，为构建更诚实可靠的AI系统提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Large language models have achieved remarkable progress on complex reasoningtasks. However, they often implicitly fabricate information when inputs areincomplete, producing confident but unreliable conclusions--a failure mode we term …

papers.title_en: Thinking Like a Botanist: Challenging Multimodal Language Models with Intent-Driven Chain-of-Inquiry
papers.tldr: 本研究针对多模态语言模型在专业视觉分析中的不足，提出了一种模拟植物学家思维的“意图驱动询问链”方法。该方法通过结构化、证据驱动的自适应提问，引导模型像专家一样逐步分析植物叶片图像。实验表明，这种方法显著增强了模型在植物病理学等复杂领域的推理和诊断能力，为提升多模态模型在专业垂直领域的表现提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Vision evaluations are typically done through multi-step processes. In mostcontemporary fields, experts analyze images using structured, evidence-basedadaptive questioning. In plant pathology, botanists inspect leaf images, identify visual …

papers.title_en: Fine-Grained Analysis of Shared Syntactic Mechanisms in Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了语言模型内部机制是否符合语言学中的跨结构原则。通过对模型处理不同句法结构时的内部表示进行细粒度分析，研究揭示了模型在处理相似句法任务时是否存在共享的神经机制。这项工作不仅深化了对模型句法能力的理解，还为评估模型内部逻辑与人类语言学理论的一致性提供了新视角。
papers.abstract_en: While language models demonstrate sophisticated syntactic capabilities, the extentto which their internal mechanisms align with cross-constructional principles studiedin linguistics remains poorly understood. This study investigates whether models …

papers.title_en: BrainDINO: A Brain MRI Foundation Model for Generalizable Clinical Representation Learning
papers.tldr: 本研究针对脑部MRI分析中模型通用性差、依赖大量标注数据的问题，提出了BrainDINO基础模型。该模型采用自监督学习方法，在海量无标注脑部MRI数据上进行预训练，学习到了具有高度泛化能力的临床表征。实验证明，BrainDINO在多种神经科学和临床任务中表现优异，显著降低了对标注数据的需求，为脑影像研究提供了强有力的通用工具。
papers.abstract_en: Brain MRI underpins a wide range of neuroscientific and clinical applications, yetmost learning-based methods remain task-specific and require substantial labeleddata. Here we show that a single self-supervised representation can generalize …

papers.tldr: 本研究从机械可解释性角度探讨了大语言模型（LLM）如何处理否定词。尽管开源模型在回答涉及否定的问题时常出错，但研究发现其内部存在专门处理否定的组件。通过分析这些内部机制，本文揭示了模型在逻辑推理中的潜在能力与局限，为提升模型对否定语义的理解提供了理论基础和改进方向。
papers.abstract_en: We study how Large Language Models (LLMs) process negation mechanistically.First, we establish that even though open-weight models often provide wronganswers to questions involving negation, they do possess internal components that …

papers.title_en: LLM-XTM: Enhancing Cross-Lingual Topic Models with Large Language Models
papers.tldr: 跨语言主题模型（CLTM）旨在发现不同语言间的共享语义，但常受限于双语资源稀缺及主题对齐不佳的问题。本文提出LLM-XTM，利用大语言模型（LLM）增强跨语言主题建模。该方法通过LLM的语义理解能力优化主题的一致性与对齐质量，有效解决了传统模型在稀缺资源下的表现瓶颈，显著提升了跨语言文本分析的准确性。
papers.abstract_en: Cross-lingual topic modeling aims to discover shared semantic structures acrosslanguages, yet existing models depend on sparse bilingual resources and often yieldincoherent or weakly aligned topics. Recent LLM-based refinements improve …

papers.title_en: Safety and accuracy follow different scaling laws in clinical large language models
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了临床大语言模型中安全性和准确性之间的关系，挑战了“准确率越高则越安全”的传统假设。通过分析模型规模、上下文长度、检索复杂度和推理计算量对性能的影响，研究发现安全性和准确性遵循不同的缩放法则。这一发现对于开发可靠的医疗AI系统具有重要意义，强调了在提升模型性能的同时必须独立评估其安全性。
papers.abstract_en: Clinical LLMs are often scaled by increasing model size, context length, retrievalcomplexity, or inference-time compute, with the implicit expectation that higheraccuracy implies safer behavior. This assumption is incomplete in medicine, where a …
